response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience on Windows and has no visible exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. Their career is centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with only a brief early-career C++ mention in LabWindows, insufficient to meet the 5–10 year requirement.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated proficiency in CI/CD, testing practices, and system design
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Absence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but no context of SQL Server or Oracle in financial systems
